prompt: Create an ultra-photorealistic extreme close-up crop of a young woman’s eyes and upper nose bridge, focusing on detailed eyelashes and especially the subtle lower eyelashes. The subject has gray-green eyes, blonde hair falling loosely across the forehead and left side of the frame, natural light skin with faint freckles and realistic pores, soft peach undertones, and minimal natural makeup. The image is tightly framed in a wide horizontal aspect ratio so only both eyes, eyebrows, part of the nose bridge, and a small amount of cheek/forehead are visible; no mouth or full face. Render delicate individual upper lashes, simplified but visible lower lashes under both eyes, moist catchlights on the irises, realistic eyelid texture, soft shadows, and shallow depth of field. Use warm natural daylight from the upper right, cinematic macro photography, high-resolution skin detail, realistic lens softness, muted beige and honey tones, intimate beauty editorial style.
